articles.author: Brian Melley, Pan Pylas
articles.title: What to know about the legacy of Brexit, which still divides Britain 10 years on - AP News
articles.description: U.K. voters chose to leave the European Union in a referendum that 10 years on still forges political identities. It was a vote that shattered a half-century project to get closer to the continent. Brexit, short for British exit, became a reality on June 23, …
articles.content: LONDON (AP) Ten years ago, the United Kingdom voted to leave the European Union in a referendum that forges political identities to this day and that shattered a half-century project to get closer to… [+7453 chars]
